I := Ideal(A, rels);

Print("Algebra constructed. Dimension: ", Dimension(B), "\n");

# Compute HH^2
HH2 := HochschildCohomology(B,2);
Print("HH^2 dimension: ", Dimension(HH2), "\n");

# Cartan matrix
C := CartanMatrix(B);
Print("Cartan matrix: ", C, "\n");
